introSection: WildCat was a steel roller coaster located at Riverside Park in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA. It was the largest Wildcat model from Schwarzkopf upon opening.

sections.title: History
sections.content: WildCat was imported from Germany at a cost of $200,000 and opened in 1968.

fullText:
WildCat was a steel roller coaster located at Riverside Park in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA. It was the largest Wildcat model from Schwarzkopf upon opening.

WildCat was imported from Germany at a cost of $200,000 and opened in 1968.



Red track and white supports.
